## Meeting Purpose

[Align marketing team priorities and strategies for Q4, with a focus on Dreamforce and other key initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Top priorities: Dreamforce (immediate focus), Builder/Buy white paper, ABM campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=630.0)
  - [New cloud version of DevOps tool in development; marketing to assist with adoption](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1698.0)
  - [Team should focus on strategic campaign building and measurable KPIs](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1079.0)
  - [Emphasis on being agile, scrappy, and avoiding bottlenecks in processes](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1614.0)

## Topics

### Priority Alignment

  - [Dreamforce is the top priority for the next 14 days](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Builder/Buy white paper and ABM campaigns are secondary priorities](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
  - [Team should consider the objective and target for each initiative](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Avoid being a bottleneck; streamline review processes where possible](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)

### Strategic Approach to Campaigns

  - [Focus on what's working and be willing to adjust quickly](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
  - [All team members should feel ownership and urgency for priorities](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Webinars viewed as a tactic rather than a standalone strategy](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)
  - [Ensure all initiatives have clear goals, targets, and measurable outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)

### New Cloud DevOps Tool

  - [Marketing team to assist with adoption of new cloud version of DevOps tool](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Aimed at smaller customers, allowing self-service and fewer touchpoints](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1845.0)
  - [Native Salesforce version to be positioned for regulated industries](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [No immediate action required from the team, but awareness is important](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1952.0)

### KPI Tracking and Reporting

  - [GrowthX to provide standard KPIs for tracking (impressions, visits, leads, pipeline)](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=2116.0)
  - [Team uses Marketo and Salesforce for lead tracking](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=2231.0)
  - [Recent drop in impressions (60,000 last week, down from 76,000) to be investigated](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=2325.0)
  - [Analytics deep dive scheduled for this week](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=2363.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jessalynn to provide standard KPIs from GrowthX and check on conversion analysis data](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=2272.0)
  - [Team to bring specific KPI interests to the upcoming analytics meeting](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=2400.0)
  - [Review and align on targets and goals for all initiatives, including product marketing](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=2495.0)
  - [Prepare for immediate focus on Dreamforce-related tasks](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Schedule further discussions on strategic campaign building and KPI management](https://fathom.video/share/HdxNvujvSPw7sdVpXYwYssLivaVWyX8a?tab=summary&timestamp=2515.0)
